## Contract

**Delegator use only.** This registry is an index, not a summary. Any agent that launches subagents reads it to select relevant skills, then passes exact `SKILL.md` paths for the subagent to read before work.

`SKILL.md` remains the source of truth. Do not inject generated summaries or compact rules by default; pass paths so subagents load the full runtime contract and preserve author intent.

## Project-specific notes

- This is a vanilla JavaScript library (Leaflet + jQuery). No Go, no Vitest/Jest/Mocha. The `go-testing` skill is NOT relevant even though it's in the user registry.
- No unit test runner is installed. Strict TDD is disabled. Verification is manual QA via the visors under the parent `D:\antigravity\idevapi\_visores_tester\` directory.
- The `git-then-svn-sync` skill is potentially relevant: the visors and help are deployed via SVN + Jenkins (not GitHub), per prior session memory.

## Loading protocol

1. Match task context and target files against the `Trigger / description` column.
2. Pass only the matching `Path` values to the subagent under `## Skills to load before work`.
3. Instruct the subagent to read those exact `SKILL.md` files before reading, writing, reviewing, testing, or creating artifacts.
4. If no matching skill exists, proceed without project skill injection and report `skill_resolution: none`.

## Project skill resolution for common tasks

| Task | Relevant skills | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| New feature in `js/idevAPI_*.js` | none specific | Follow existing patterns; update `*-min.js` via `npm run build` |
| New visor under `_visores_tester/` | `cognitive-doc-design` (for help), `git-then-svn-sync` (for deploy) | Visors are NOT in this git repo — they live in the parent workspace |
| Publishing a new version | `work-unit-commits`, `branch-pr` | Cut a tag, push, jsdelivr will pick it up |
| Translating help to Valencian | none | Use `.github/prompts/traduccion_apartado_ayuda.md` if it exists |
| Add unit tests | `go-testing` (no — wrong language) | This project does not have a test runner; adding one is a separate decision |
